name: Volcano Classic Vaporizer
summary: The original German-built balloon-bag desktop vaporiser from Storz & Bickel, for hands-free home dosing.
description: The Volcano Classic is Storz & Bickel's long-running desktop vaporiser, filling a detachable balloon bag with vapour you then medicate from hands-free. Convection heating through a food-grade aluminium block and an all-metal body give it a reputation for reliability that runs into years, with temperature set on a simple dial. It suits patients who want consistent, hands-free dosing at home and value a device that lasts. Heat-up is slower at around three minutes and it is a heavy mains-only unit, but it is one of the most durable home vaporisers made and carries a three-year warranty.
